title: DR BECKMANN STAIN DEVIL NATURE AND COSMETICS 50GM
features: Effective Stain Removal – Specifically formulated to eliminate stubborn stains from makeup, lipstick, body lotion, grass, soil, pollen, and other pigment-rich substances. ​
Pigment Remover Technology – Utilizes advanced pigment-removing agents combined with surfactants to dissolve and lift tough stains without damaging fabrics. ​
Safe for Various Fabrics – Suitable for both washable and non-washable textiles, ensuring versatility in stain removal applications. ​
Color and Fabric Protection – Designed to be gentle on colors and materials, preserving the integrity and appearance of your garments. ​
Easy Application – Simple pre-treatment process: apply directly to the stain, let it sit for 10-15 minutes, then wash or dab as appropriate for the fabric type. ​
description: Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils Nature & Cosmetics (50ml) is expertly formulated to tackle stubborn stains from makeup, lipstick, body lotions, grass, soil, and pollen. Its advanced pigment remover technology, combined with surfactants, effectively dissolves and lifts stains while being gentle on colors and fabrics. Suitable for both washable and non-washable textiles, this stain remover ensures your garments remain in pristine condition. For optimal results, apply directly to the stain, allow it to work for 10-15 minutes, then proceed with washing or dabbing as appropriate. ​
